TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: 2026 u kahenulan nu mukeliday nu yi-lang 2026ŚĻīšľäśúóť†ėŚįéšļļŚćĪś©ü namakayni i 2026 nu amilika a tu mapulungay a milepacaw tu yi-lang atu a-li. Ha-mi-ni mapacuk a kawaw namahida sa , Ťá™2026 ¬∑ŚďąÁĪ≥ŚįľťĀáŚąļšļčšĽ∂šĽ•šĺÜ,mikusiw kyu sipsep ku mapatayay nu sakakaay nu yi-lang , kyu u yi-lang u miluluday a tademaw idaw ku talaw , ,katukuh i 2026 a mihcaan 3 ay a bulad 8 a demiad ci mu-ciy-ta-pa . ha-mi-ni milubang ku namiecaway misingkiw mikilin tu satalakaway nu sakakaaw nu yi-lang . ¬∑ . u nicangdayayn nida ŤÉĆśôĮ2025a mihcaan 6 a bulad masikeda 2025ŚĻī6śúąŤ•≤śďä tatudungan a sapamata nu Amilika miwait tu lacu i kitidaan tu he hananay 2025a mihcaan 6 a bulad 22 a demiad , mala sabatusa a demiad malpacaw nu dumaay , 2025ŚĻī6śúą22śó•, ,u hitay nu Amilika pahikukiay a tu balungaay mapulung patideng i teban nu labi a mikusiw , mipusiw tu kitidaan nu yi-lang a nipi kiyaku . .sakamu sa ku yi-lang nu ihekalay a tapang ci a-pa-se. a -la-ke-ci , pahaceng ku nibakuhac i yi-lang kyu yadah ku ma bakuhacay malekeb , ,kyu nipikiyaku nu yi-lang tadikuda aca tu tusa a mihcaan . . 2026 a mihcaan 2 abulad mikusiw2026ŚĻī2śúąŤ•≤śďäTatelungan a sapamata sa 2026 a mihcaan u Amilika mikusiw tu yi-lang 2026 a mihcaan 2 a bulad 28 a demiad u yi-lang makusiw nu Amilika nu mapulungay a hitay makusiw , 2026ŚĻī2śúą28śó•, ,u nipikawaw u sapibelin tu siy-hu nu yi-lang atu ayatulaalila. hamini a nikuwanan nida a siyhu . pikusiwan , Ali.hamini a kitidaan maminmapeci .Á©ļŤ•≤śúüťĖď,ťėŅťáĆ¬∑ŚďąÁĪ≥ŚįľÁöĄŚģėťāłŤĘęśĮÄ.u mapatayay idaw ci ali.hamini , u kadabu u baki atu sunna atu kadabu i pikusiwan mamin mapatay . . ci hamini ku miluluday ŚďąÁĪ≥ŚįľŚŹĮŤÉĹÁöĄÁĻľšĽĽŤÄÖ siyhu nu yi-lang šľäśúóśĒŅŚļúAli.laliciyaniťėŅťáĆ¬∑śčČťáĆŤ≥ąŚįľsakamu sa ku yilusaleng nipahusu tu sasakamun , ci hamini yu nuayawan nu sikeda a mapatay nu nem a demiad , mapatudek tu ci la-li-ciya-ni ku miluluday malasakakaay . śďö" . satikelali.laliciyaniŤĖ©ŤŅ™ŚÖč¬∑śčČťáĆŤ≥ąŚįľnu ayawan nu sakakaay a giing ci ali-lalini u kakanida ci sa-ti-ke , u satalakaway a nipisingkiw u duma minabaway a sasingkiwan a tademaw , ,wiyda sa ci hamini u duma a miluluday a mikutay . .
S.PHON: **** u kańß…ônur~…ĺan nu muk…ôr~…ĺidaj nu ji-r~…ĺaŇč ************ namakajni i **** nu amir~…ĺika a tu mapur~…ĺuŇčaj a mir~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw tu ji-r~…ĺaŇč atu a-r~…ĺi. ńßa-mi-ni mapa ¶uk a kawaw namańßida sa , ***** **********,mikusiw kju sips…ôp ku mapatajaj nu sakakaaj nu ji-r~…ĺaŇč , kju u ji-r~…ĺaŇč u mir~…ĺur~…ĺudaj a tad…ômaw idaw ku tar~…ĺaw , ,katukuńß i **** a mińß ¶aan * aj a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad ¶i mu- ¶ij-ta-pa . ńßa-mi-ni mir~…ĺubaŇč ku nami…ô ¶awaj misiŇčkiw mikir~…ĺin tu satar~…ĺakawaj nu sakakaaw nu ji-r~…ĺaŇč . * . u ni ¶aŇčdajajn nida ******a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad masik…ôda ********* tatuduŇčan a sapamata nu amir~…ĺika miwait tu r~…ĺa ¶u i kitidaan tu ńß…ô ńßananaj ****a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad , mar~…ĺa sabatusa a d…ômiad mar~…ĺpa ¶aw nu dumaaj , **********, ,u ńßitaj nu amir~…ĺika pańßikukiaj a tu bar~…ĺuŇčaaj mapur~…ĺuŇč patid…ôŇč i t…ôban nu r~…ĺabi a mikusiw , mipusiw tu kitidaan nu ji-r~…ĺaŇč a nipi kijaku . .sakamu sa ku ji-r~…ĺaŇč nu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tapaŇč ¶i a-pa-s…ô. a -r~…ĺa-k…ô- ¶i , pańßa ¶…ôŇč ku nibakuńßa ¶ i ji-r~…ĺaŇč kju jadańß ku ma bakuńßa ¶aj mar~…ĺ…ôk…ôb , ,kju nipikijaku nu ji-r~…ĺaŇč tadikuda a ¶a tu tusa a mińß ¶aan . . **** a mińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad mikusiw*********tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan a sapamata sa **** a mińß ¶aan u amir~…ĺika mikusiw tu ji-r~…ĺaŇč **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad u ji-r~…ĺaŇč makusiw nu amir~…ĺika nu mapur~…ĺuŇčaj a ńßitaj makusiw , **********, ,u nipikawaw u sapib…ôr~…ĺin tu sij-ńßu nu ji-r~…ĺaŇč atu ajatur~…ĺaar~…ĺir~…ĺa. ńßamini a nikuwanan nida a sijńßu . pikusiwan , ar~…ĺi.ńßamini a kitidaan maminmap…ô ¶i .****,***********.u mapatajaj idaw ¶i ar~…ĺi.ńßamini , u kadabu u baki atu sunna atu kadabu i pikusiwan mamin mapataj . . ¶i ńßamini ku mir~…ĺur~…ĺudaj ********* sijńßu nu ji-r~…ĺaŇč ****ar~…ĺi.r~…ĺar~…ĺi ¶ijani*******sakamu sa ku jir~…ĺusar~…ĺ…ôŇč nipańßusu tu sasakamun , ¶i ńßamini ju nuajawan nu sik…ôda a mapataj nu n…ôm a d…ômiad , mapatud…ôk tu ¶i r~…ĺa-r~…ĺi- ¶ija-ni ku mir~…ĺur~…ĺudaj mar~…ĺasakakaaj . *" . satik…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺi.r~…ĺar~…ĺi ¶ijani********nu ajawan nu sakakaaj a giiŇč ¶i ar~…ĺi-r~…ĺar~…ĺini u kakanida ¶i sa-ti-k…ô , u satar~…ĺakawaj a nipisiŇčkiw u duma minabawaj a sasiŇčkiwan a tad…ômaw , ,wijda sa ¶i ńßamini u duma a mir~…ĺur~…ĺudaj a mikutaj . .
S.FORM: 2026 u kahenulan nu mukeliday nu yi-lang 2026ŚĻīšľäśúóť†ėŚįéšļļŚćĪś©ü namakayni i 2026 nu amilika a tu mapulungay a milepacaw tu yi-lang atu a-li. Ha-mi-ni mapacuk a kawaw namahida sa , Ťá™2026 ¬∑ŚďąÁĪ≥ŚįľťĀáŚąļšļčšĽ∂šĽ•šĺÜ,mikusiw kyu sipsep ku mapatayay nu sakakaay nu yi-lang , kyu u yi-lang u miluluday a tademaw idaw ku talaw , ,katukuh i 2026 a mihcaan 3 ay a bulad 8 a demiad ci mu-ciy-ta-pa . ha-mi-ni milubang ku namiecaway misingkiw mikilin tu satalakaway nu sakakaaw nu yi-lang . ¬∑ . u nicangdayayn nida ŤÉĆśôĮ2025a mihcaan 6 a bulad masikeda 2025ŚĻī6śúąŤ•≤śďä tatudungan a sapamata nu Amilika miwait tu lacu i kitidaan tu he hananay 2025a mihcaan 6 a bulad 22 a demiad , mala sabatusa a demiad malpacaw nu dumaay , 2025ŚĻī6śúą22śó•, ,u hitay nu Amilika pahikukiay a tu balungaay mapulung patideng i teban nu labi a mikusiw , mipusiw tu kitidaan nu yi-lang a nipi kiyaku . .sakamu sa ku yi-lang nu ihekalay a tapang ci a-pa-se. a -la-ke-ci , pahaceng ku nibakuhac i yi-lang kyu yadah ku ma bakuhacay malekeb , ,kyu nipikiyaku nu yi-lang tadikuda aca tu tusa a mihcaan . . 2026 a mihcaan 2 abulad mikusiw2026ŚĻī2śúąŤ•≤śďäTatelungan a sapamata sa 2026 a mihcaan u Amilika mikusiw tu yi-lang 2026 a mihcaan 2 a bulad 28 a demiad u yi-lang makusiw nu Amilika nu mapulungay a hitay makusiw , 2026ŚĻī2śúą28śó•, ,u nipikawaw u sapibelin tu siy-hu nu yi-lang atu ayatulaalila. hamini a nikuwanan nida a siyhu . pikusiwan , Ali.hamini a kitidaan maminmapeci .Á©ļŤ•≤śúüťĖď,ťėŅťáĆ¬∑ŚďąÁĪ≥ŚįľÁöĄŚģėťāłŤĘęśĮÄ.u mapatayay idaw ci ali.hamini , u kadabu u baki atu sunna atu kadabu i pikusiwan mamin mapatay . . ci hamini ku miluluday ŚďąÁĪ≥ŚįľŚŹĮŤÉĹÁöĄÁĻľšĽĽŤÄÖ siyhu nu yi-lang šľäśúóśĒŅŚļúAli.laliciyaniťėŅťáĆ¬∑śčČťáĆŤ≥ąŚįľsakamu sa ku yilusaleng nipahusu tu sasakamun , ci hamini yu nuayawan nu sikeda a mapatay nu nem a demiad , mapatudek tu ci la-li-ciya-ni ku miluluday malasakakaay . śďö" . satikelali.laliciyaniŤĖ©ŤŅ™ŚÖč¬∑śčČťáĆŤ≥ąŚįľnu ayawan nu sakakaay a giing ci ali-lalini u kakanida ci sa-ti-ke , u satalakaway a nipisingkiw u duma minabaway a sasingkiwan a tademaw , ,wiyda sa ci hamini u duma a miluluday a mikutay . .
